title: Dimension Changer
description: Change what dimension you're in by running the /changedimension command as an operator!
body:
If you've ever wanted/needed to change dimensions on the fly, but didnt want to build an entire portal to switch dimensions, this mod is for you!

Just run the /changedimension command as an operator to change what dimension your in! It will teleport you to the coordinates your at in whatever dimension you teleport to (overworld nether or end)!

This is a mod for Forge 1.20.1, NeoForge 1.20.6, and Fabric 1.20.1! I am currently seeing if I can make this a plugin but I dont know for sure yet.

Hope you enjoy!
